response.justification: The candidate is an experienced, versatile senior developer with a strong web and full-stack background, but their profile does not match this role's core requirements. Professional C++ experience is limited to a seven-month stint at National Instruments in 2014–2015; their systems-level work since has been in DLang, and recent years are dominated by TypeScript/Node.js product work. There is no evidence of message-broker architectures at industrial scale in C++, MQTT/IoT protocol work, or Secure Development Lifecycle / IEC 62443 experience, all of which are central to this position.
strengths: 15+ years of broad software experience across web, desktop, and embedded systems
Low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (millions of HTTP requests/sec) using async I/O and fibers
Strong craftsmanship practices: TDD, CI/CD, mentoring, workshops, and open-source contributions
concerns: Minimal professional C++ experience (~7 months, over a decade ago); recent stack is TypeScript/Node.js
No industrial automation, IEC 62443, SDL, or MQTT/OT protocol experience
No demonstrated experience with message brokers or event-driven C++ architectures at the required scale

key_factors.factor: Strong systems and performance engineering fundamentals
